description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the dehuk/gitlab-ci-drupal:latest Docker image with no extra services. Define a global before_script that runs apt-get update, apt-get upgrade -y, pre‑seeds the MySQL root password to "root" via debconf-set-selections, installs mysql-server, starts the MySQL service, and installs php5-sqlite and php5-mysql. Add a build stage job named build that executes composer install, cd docroot, mkdir themes, and runs the Drupal password‑hashing PHPUnit test with ../bin/phpunit -c core core/tests/Drupal/Tests/Core/Password/PasswordHashingTest.php. The job runs in the build stage without caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
